analysis.reasoning: Core message: China and Tanzania held an online conference to share experiences using traditional medicine against COVID-19 and pledged to strengthen cooperation in applying traditional medicine to treat diseases. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention of the West or hostility. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Supported: the tweet highlights international cooperation, knowledge sharing, and commitment to joint health efforts, portraying China as collaborative and supportive. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic) – Not addressed; focus is international cooperation rather than domestic governance or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not explicitly about domestic achievements or leadership; no claim of technological or social leadership inside China. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not about culture or tourism. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
